lineup_source: Egypt vs New Zealand, 2026 World Cup Group Stage, June 2026 (4-3-3)

players.name: Mostafa Shobeir
players.note: Born in Giza; son of former Egypt World Cup goalkeeper Ahmed Shobair.

players.name: Ahmed Fatouh
players.note: Born in Cairo; no documented foreign parentage, typical Egyptian background.

players.name: Mohamed Abdelmonem
players.note: Born in Zagazig to a working-class Egyptian family; no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Yasser Ibrahim
players.note: Born in Mansoura; no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Mohamed Hany
players.note: Born and raised in Egypt; joined Al Ahly's youth academy as a child.

players.name: Emam Ashour
players.note: Born and raised in El Senbellawein, Egypt; no parental heritage documented.

players.name: Marwan Attia
players.note: Born in Kafr El Dawwar, Egypt; father (deceased 2023) was Egyptian.

players.name: Hamdy Fathy
players.note: Born in Beheira Governorate, Egypt; no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Mostafa Ziko
players.note: Born Mostafa Mohamed Zaky Abdelraouf; typical Egyptian background, no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Omar Marmoush
players.note: Born in Cairo to Egyptian parents who lived in Canada for six years (he holds dual Egyptian-Canadian citizenship) before resettling in Egypt.

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.note: Born in Nagrig, Gharbia Governorate; father Salah Ghaly and mother Sobhiya both Egyptian.
